hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git commit' && git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^plugins/workflow-orchestrator/' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"STOP: You are about to commit changes that include files under plugins/workflow-orchestrator/. Before committing, you MUST:
1. Read the Mode 4: Help section in plugins/workflow-orchestrator/skills/workflow-orchestrator/SKILL.md
2. Run: git diff --cached -- plugins/workflow-orchestrator/
3. Compare the staged changes against the help guide content
4. If any changes affect commands, step types, YAML schema, expressions, error handling, or other user-facing behavior documented in the help guide, update the help section to match
5. Stage any help updates
6. Then proceed with the commit"}}' || true
